title: ADULT AND YOUTH EDUCATION - 211info
text: ZENGER FARM ADULT AND YOUTH EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a range of educational opportunities in food, farming, wetland conservation, and environmental stewardship in healthy urban communities. Programs include open farm days for families to learn and explore at the farm with seasonal activities and farm summer camps for youth. 11741 SE Foster Road Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday hours vary Email (503) 282-4245 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (503) 282-4245 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: Varies by program. Sliding scale and free programs available. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income for scholarship assistance LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Camps Nutrition Education Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY SUPPORTED AGRICULTURE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ZENGER FARM
